creator: jonc@chen.org.nz
text:
On 13 March 2012 06:36,  <cs@freebsd.org> wrote:
[...]
> [ 64%] Generating sigil_tr_TR.qm
> cd /work/a/ports/textproc/sigil/work/src/Sigil && QT_LRELEASE_EXECUTABLE-NOTFOUND /work/a/ports/textproc/sigil/work/src/Sigil/Resource_Files/ts/sigil_tr_TR.ts -qm /work/a/ports/textproc/sigil/work/src/Sigil/sigil_tr_TR.qm
> QT_LRELEASE_EXECUTABLE-NOTFOUND: not found
> *** Error code 127
>
> Stop in /work/a/ports/textproc/sigil/work.
> *** Error code 1

The "linguist" module needs to be added to QT_COMPONENTS in the Makefile, ie:

QT_COMPONENTS=  qmake gui svg webkit xml moc uic rcc imageformats linguist

Cheers.
-- 
Jonathan Chen <jonc@chen.org.nz>
